name: panacea-portal
description: Panacea Portal — Clinical Operations Management Platform

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix backend"
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix frontend && npm run lint --prefix backend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix frontend && npm run typecheck --prefix backend
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix frontend && npm run test --prefix backend
scripts.clean: rimraf frontend/.next frontend/dist frontend/node_modules backend/dist backend/node_modules

author: Panacea Team
